rows.description: Soluta varia.
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed as a clear header at the top center of the page.

rows.description: Account Dinner
rows.notes: Consensus between gemini-flash and gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed as a clear section header.

rows.description: 4 money baggs and Files
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.7.3. gpt-5-mini stated the numerals were faint/partly cut but they are clear in the image. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: To Cognus for fewel &c
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.0.0 (dashes for zero). gpt-5-mini was overly cautious and left amounts blank. Used gemini-flash's description 'Cognus' which matches the image.

rows.description: To Collison Carpenter from Febr. 16. to Nov. 8th 99. 700
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 46.1.6. gpt-5-mini's note about the amount being obscured is inaccurate; the numbers are clear. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: To West Book binder for Mr Wells his mapps
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.0.0 (dashes for zero). gpt-5-mini was overly cautious. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: To Eldradge for 29 Load of Rubbish, 3 Load of gravel and 1 of mold
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.7.0. gpt-5-mini's note about smudged digits is inaccurate. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: To James Hilleard Glacier
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.5.0. gpt-5-mini's note about obscurity is inaccurate. Used gemini-flash's description 'Hilleard' which matches the image.

rows.description: To Mr Verman on his restoraon to ye profits of his Fellowship past by ye Visitor's order
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 3.18.6. gpt-5-mini's reading of 14 shillings and 9 pence was incorrect. Used gemini-flash's description for more accurate text (Verman, Fellowship, Visitor's).

rows.description: Lost by ye fall of Guineas put into ye chest 1698
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 149.19.0. gpt-5-mini's note about faintness is inaccurate. Used gemini-flash's description 'Guineas' which matches the image.

rows.description: To Boyer for for work in ye back Quadrangle
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 1.5.0.5. The 'ob' symbol for half-penny is clear in the image. gpt-5-mini's note about blurring/cut-off is inaccurate. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: To Mr Rothwell a minister by consent
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.1.3. gpt-5-mini's note about faintness/ambiguity is inaccurate. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: Laid out by Mr Hutchins for ye Comoners Library
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.0.4. gpt-5-mini's note about faintness/ink blots is inaccurate. Used gemini-flash's description 'Comoners' which matches the image.

rows.description: To Cognus for Chtms, New years day, and Epiphany Dinn.
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 1.1.10. gpt-5-mini's reading of 0.12.6 was incorrect. Used gemini-flash's description for accurate text (Cognus, Chtms, Dinn.).

rows.description: For Stampt paper and a Citaon agst Paynter
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.12.6. gpt-5-mini's note about smudged numerals is inaccurate. Used gemini-flash's description 'Citaon agst' which matches the image.

rows.description: For 3 horses and chargs in going to Hamborow
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.12.6. gpt-5-mini's note about faintness/overlap is inaccurate. Used gemini-flash's description 'Hamborow' which matches the image.

rows.description: To Ralph Cox for Gasses and matts for ye chapell
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.3.6. gpt-5-mini's note is inaccurate and its description included text ('more to him') that belongs to the next entry. Used gemini-flash.

rows.description: more to him
rows.notes: This row was found only by gemini-flash. Visually confirmed it as a distinct entry with amounts 0.7.6. gpt-5-mini incorrectly merged this text into the previous entry's description.

rows.description: To Day ye Smith march 15th
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.4.9. gpt-5-mini's note about faintness/obscurity is inaccurate. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: For two money baggs
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.3.0. gpt-5-mini's note about faintness/ambiguity is inaccurate. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: Candlles
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Both identified this as a header. gemini-flash's description 'Candlles' more accurately reflects the spelling in the image than gpt-5-mini's '(Candles)'.

rows.description: To Cosens for ye chapell {Ann Mich}
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.7.9. gpt-5-mini misread pence as 7 and incorrectly added a 0.5 fraction. gemini-flash's description 'Cosens' and inclusion of '{Ann Mich}' is also more complete and accurate.

rows.description: To Broadwater for ye Buttery for a year
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.16.6. gpt-5-mini's reading of 4 shillings and 11 pence was incorrect. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: To Pain ye Brazier
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.11.0. gpt-5-mini's reading of 5 shillings and 6 pence was incorrect. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: To Hifield ye Slater
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.6.7. gpt-5-mini misread the shillings and pence (11 shillings, 6 pence) and had an incorrect description ('Gipfield'). Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: Taxe allowed to
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed this is a header for the two braced sub-items ('George' and 'Jennings'). gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this header and its sub-items into a single entry with no amounts.

rows.description: George {4r 6r mich 6r}
rows.notes: This row was found only by gemini-flash as a distinct entry. Visually confirmed amounts 0.6.7. Refined the description to clearly separate 'George' from the bracketed text '{4r 6r mich 6r}', which is supplementary to the name.

rows.description: Jennings {4r 6r mich 6r}
rows.notes: This row was found only by gemini-flash as a distinct entry. Visually confirmed amounts 0.10.6. Refined the description to clearly separate 'Jennings' from the bracketed text '{4r 6r mich 6r}', which is supplementary to the name.

rows.description: To James Davies Joiner
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.2.10. gpt-5-mini misread pence as 0 (or 2) and was overly cautious. Used gemini-flash's description 'Davies' which matches the image.

rows.description: For 3 horses going to Longwitnam and charges for visiuing ye chancell
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.13.6. gpt-5-mini's note about faintness is inaccurate. Used gemini-flash's description for accurate text (Longwitnam, visiuing).

rows.description: To Jo. Halifax Ironmonger for nails &c. abt ye house
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visually verified the description and amounts 0.0.6. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this with the 'of Office' line and misread the amounts as 3.1.2. gemini-flash correctly segmented this as a separate entry.

rows.description: of Office
rows.notes: Selected gemini-flash. Visually confirmed this is a sub-entry within a braced group, with amount 0.1.0. gpt-5-mini incorrectly combined this with the preceding line and misread the amount.

rows.description: To Townsend ye mason from Apr. 29. 99. to May 31. 1701
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 5.9.2.0.75, including the '3q' symbol for three farthings. gpt-5-mini misread the pence as 4 and missed the fraction. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: To Mrs Edwards towards ye rebuilding of ye South end of ye vicarage house of Kidlington By consent
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 9.2.10. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pounds as zero and seemed to be influenced by a marginal note rather than the main amount. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: For Buttery books at Nat. and Bapt
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.1.4. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pounds as 30; the image clearly shows zero. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: To Fra. Bugge by consent
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus (0.1.6) between extractors. Used gemini-flash's description 'Fra.' which matches the image more accurately than gpt-5-mini's 'Mrs'.

rows.description: For Mr Rennells, mine and my mans journy to Slyfield abt ye and other Estates, given ye Coll. in Reversion
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 3.1.3. gpt-5-mini misread the amounts as 0.3.1 and incorrectly added a 0.75 fraction with low confidence. Used gemini-flash's description for accurate text (Rennells, Slyfield, Estates).

rows.description: For 4 horses 6 dayes for ye journy
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.10.0. gpt-5-mini misread shillings as 1 and pence as 10. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: For wedding and cleansing ye Rood yard
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.0.9.0.5, including the clear 'ob' symbol for half-penny. gpt-5-mini missed the fraction. Used gemini-flash's description for accurate text (wedding, Rood yard).

rows.description: To Mr Clark bookseller for auditing books, paper &c.
rows.notes: Amounts are consensus (0.12.0) between extractors. Used gemini-flash's description 'auditing' which matches the image more accurately than gpt-5-mini's 'cutting'.

rows.description: For 10 qrts of Red Gallitia Oct. 5th 1701
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.12.8. gpt-5-mini misread the pence as 6. Used gemini-flash's description for accurate text ('qrts', 'Gallitia').

rows.description: To Will: Day Smith Novembr 1st 1701
rows.notes: gpt-5-mini's value of 12 pence violated the hard rule (Pence ≥ 12) and was disqualified for this row. Visually confirmed gemini-flash's reading of 0.16.8. Selected gemini-flash.

rows.description: To James Hilleard Glacier
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 0.12.0. gpt-5-mini misread amounts as 0.0.3 and added an unverified 0.5 fraction. Used gemini-flash's description 'Hilleard' which is consistent with earlier entries.

rows.description: Collison Carpenter
rows.notes: Visually verified gemini-flash's reading of 1.3.2. gpt-5-mini misread amounts as 0.3.10 and added an unverified 0.25 fraction with low confidence. Selected gemini-flash.
